title: Green Crisp Australian Avocado Salad
description: A refreshing and healthy Australian-inspired salad featuring avocado, with a mustardy and crisp twist, perfect for a low-calorie friendly meal during the monsoon season.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens, diced avocado, and thinly sliced red onion.
In a small bowl, whisk together the whole grain mustard, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper to make the dressing.
Drizzle the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
Sprinkle the crispy fried shallots over the top of the salad.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the salad a good toss to redistribute the ingredients.
Serve the salad chilled, garnished with additional crispy fried shallots if desired.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
